networks.name: Geodnet
networks.topFinding: **11 exact (lat,lng) duplicate groups** on 19,616 public stations — each row in §1 is one coordinate pair your registry team can grep today.
networks.verificationCall: Sample station IDs that share an exact coordinate pair in §1 and run POST /api/verify-device on each operator's Proof of Origin to confirm whether they resolve to distinct, real device identities.

networks.name: WeatherXM
networks.topFinding: **288 cells** exceed designed capacity — §1 lists H3 indices + map centers for your ops queue.
networks.verificationCall: For operators in the over-capacity H3 cells in §1, run POST /api/verify-device to attest active, signed device presence over time and compare against the public cell tally.

networks.name: Hivemapper
networks.publicSource: Solana mainnet HONEY SPL mint (public RPC)
networks.topFinding: **49.13% of UI-reported HONEY** sits in the **top 20 visible SPL accounts** (Solana RPC cap) — economic *shape* for treasury/MM review, not a contributor GPS read.
networks.reason: On-chain holder/economic shape — NOT a device-level claim. verify-device cannot link holders to operators; monitor only.

networks.name: Natix Network
networks.publicSource: Natix Coverage Map metrics feed (coverage.natix.network/coverage/v1/metrics) + Solana NATIX SPL mint
networks.reason: No qualifying headline finding extracted from report yet.

networks.name: Nodle
networks.publicSource: Nodle public scan inputs (see script header)
networks.verificationCall: Sample flagged node IDs showing BEACON_COLLISION_CLUSTER from §1 and run POST /api/verify-device to confirm whether co-located nodes resolve to distinct, real device identities.

networks.name: Dawn Network

networks.verificationCall: Sample flagged app IDs showing HARDWARE_APPID_CLONE_TWIN from §1 and run POST /api/verify-device to confirm whether cloned app instances resolve to distinct, real device identities.
